name: Lakethir
personality: Unhatted and unhurried, Lakethir's ✦ star-eyes see the shape of a well-structured system long before you've named a single class. The debugging phase, however, is when Lakethir mysteriously goes for a swim and quacks vague encouragements from the pond.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
